name: Obsidian GitHub
description: Connect AI assistants to your GitHub-hosted Obsidian vault to seamlessly access, search, and analy
longDescription: Comprehensive Obsidian MCP server with 43+ tools for notes, search, graph traversal, tags, frontmatter, canvas, templates, and vault management. Supports Dataview queries and semantic search.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Read the content of my meeting notes
Search for notes about project planning
Show me all backlinks to this note
Create a new note with today's daily template
Find orphaned notes in my vault
